channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Need more options for your Image Generation use cases in Hermes Agent?
We got you covered! Now ava...
item.description:
Need more options for your Image Generation use cases in Hermes Agent?
We got you covered! Now available, just run `hermes update`!
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 5 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 814
item.author: @Teknium

item.title: Introducing expanded coverage for image generation models in Hermes Agent and Nous Portal Tool Gatew...
item.description:
Introducing expanded coverage for image generation models in Hermes Agent and Nous Portal Tool Gateway!
Choose models from ChatGPT Image, Nano Banana, z-Image, FLUX, and more!
Access now with `hermes update` and then `hermes tools` -&gt; select Fal -&gt; choose image model. https://t.co/TEdWQfTCCE
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 79 | 🔁 10 | 💬 5 | 👁 4374
item.author: @NousResearch
